hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+(add|commit).*secrets\.toml' && { echo 'Blocked: refusing to git add/commit .streamlit/secrets.toml (contains the password hash; already gitignored).' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""'); case "$f" in *calibration/vehicle/*.py) python -m pytest tests/test_vehicle.py -x -q ;; *calibration/portfolio/*.py) python -m pytest tests/test_portfolio.py -x -q ;; *calibration/project/*.py) python -m pytest tests/test_project.py -x -q ;; */auth.py) python -m pytest tests/test_auth.py -x -q ;; esac
